nodes.name: 珠颈斑鸠
nodes.summary: 珠颈斑鸠（Spotted dove，学名 Spilopelia chinensis），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They are now a common urban wildlife species found in streets, parks, gardens, agricultural areas, and tropical shrublands in diverse locations throughout eastern Australia and around the cities and major towns across southern Australia. The original populations appear to be S
